purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Tuoba Yanxiong multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem is locked. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Tuoba Yanxiong crest, modern logo, large chest badge, shoulder patch, shield emblem, flag, or banner. Use the locked Wanshou emblem and northern symbol board only as root references for bonewood knot, rawhide cord, oath cord, wind-worn bone, and small tool-token material language.
must_have: Tuoba Yanxiong must read as a 30-40-year-old White Bear clan shield-guard and snow-forge craftsman

mostly upright bear-bodied beastfolk identity with round bear ears, short wide muzzle, heavy brow, very broad shoulders, shield-like chest, huge forearms, giant hands, short claws, and readable calm emotion
three states must preserve one continuous identity

white bear fur mantle, broad black iron chest band, heavy leather apron with ember scorch marks, snow-forge tool chain, iron file, bone hammer, rivet pouch, blackstone wedges, old iron tongs, rawhide repair cord, bronze bracers, hemp waist rope, small ember seed jar, and large plain repaired shield
the design must be distinct from noble northern characters and generic siege troops: more craft-focused, heavier bear-bodied, shield-repair oriented, and named-character readable
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new bear clan crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, banner, flag, ordinary human wearing bear ears, human with costume ears only, cute bear mascot, teddy bear, full animal on all fours, monster beast, generic orc, blacksmith dwarf, noble shaman, Lu Mi costume clone, Helian Xuedai costume clone, generic siege troop body swap, polished fantasy plate armor, samurai armor, knight armor, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, modern military uniform, ragged beggar fur, torn dirty fur, full-body mud, blood gore, high-magic blue-purple aura, spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall human soldier costume, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art

input_images.role: existing northern beastfolk board layout and material reference; use for board structure and northern material continuity, not as a generic body swap
existing vertical project character board layout reference
northern bone, old wood, fur, hide rope, oath cord, frost, and low-technology material reference
locked Wanshou emblem reference only; do not redesign, redraw, enlarge, or place as a visible shield/chest/banner emblem
northern object-symbol reference for bonewood knot, rawhide cord, oath cord, and tool-token forms; not a new badge

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Tuoba Yanxiong from the series Severed Homeland. Use the existing project character boards as layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same character, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Tuoba Yanxiong is a 30-40-year-old White Bear clan shield-guard and snow-forge craftsman responsible for repairing Northern bone-iron gear. He is a lower craft and military artisan tier beastfolk, so he must be a mostly upright bear-bodied beastfolk, not a beautiful human with bear ears and not a full four-legged animal. He is about 2.18-2.28 meters tall and 210-260 kg, visually two to three times the mass of an ordinary human heavy soldier. His identity is consistent across states: shield-like chest, very broad shoulders and back, short thick neck, thick waist without obesity, extremely thick forearms, huge hands larger than a human face, visible short claws, round white bear ears with pale grey inner ear, short wide muzzle, heavy brow, broad nose bridge, wide jaw, white bear down around sideburns and chin, deep brown eyes with a tiny cold-blue catchlight, calm grounded protective expression. Show the same Tuoba Yanxiong in three continuous states: 1) snow-forge craftsman normal state, massive upright bear artisan in a groomed but wind-worn white bear fur mantle, broad black iron chest band, heavy deep-brown leather apron with local ember scorch marks, snow-forge tool chain, one huge paw holding an iron file or bone hammer, rivet pouch, old iron tongs, blackstone wedges, rawhide repair cord, small ember seed jar tied at belt, low repair block or practical tool context; 2) shield-guard battle-ready state, same bear body with fur mantle tightened, chest band and bronze bracers exposed, large plain repaired bone-iron or wood-iron great shield held forward, shield big enough to cover an ordinary human, short guard axe or repair hammer at side, apron strapped for movement, shield dented and repaired with old iron rivets and rawhide straps, no shield emblem; 3) migration repair or field maintenance state, same character traveling with shield on back or set beside him, compacted tool chain, rivet pouch, blackstone wedge bag, old wood brace pieces, rawhide repair cords, protected ember seed jar, heavy boots with ice studs and bear-claw tread, reads as a frozen migration camp repairer and shield-wall support. Include lower detail panels: Tuoba's bear face and round ears, huge paw with short claws holding iron file, black iron chest band over white fur and heavy chest, snow-forge tool chain with file, bone hammer, rivet pouch, tongs, blackstone wedges, heavy leather apron edge with ember scorch marks, front and back of plain repaired great shield with no emblem, small ember seed jar with restrained dark-red glow, bronze bracer and beast-bone toggles, heavy boot sole with ice studs and bear-claw tread, material swatches of white bear fur, black iron, bronze, deep brown leather, bone white, old wood, frozen earth grey, blackstone snow dust, dark red oath cord, and tiny ember red. Badge rule: do not redesign the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem. Do not create a new bear clan crest, personal Tuoba Yanxiong crest, chest badge, shoulder patch, shield emblem, painted shield symbol, flag, or banner. Use the existing Wanshou and northern symbol language only as material reference for bonewood knots, rawhide cord, oath cord, wind-worn bone, and small tool tokens. Distinguish him from Lu Mi and Helian Xuedai: less noble, less ceremonial, more bear-bodied, heavier, craft-focused, and shield-repair focused. Distinguish him from generic Northern siege troops: not a Blackfang breacher, not an Ironhorn shield soldier, not a monster horde, not a simple weapon swap. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic fur, black iron, bronze, leather, bone, old wood, rawhide, snow, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
